name: Philosopher's Rune
why: One of the strongest Epic relics in the game. Its buffs benefit every faction, making it an outstanding long-term investment for both free-to-play and low-spending players.
description: Activates Hidden Surge to strengthen allied heroes while improving the team's overall combat effectiveness. Philosopher's Rune remains one of the most reliable Epic relics and continues to perform well until complete Legendary relic sets become available.
